v1.0.0.description:
Initial release of the Ape Escape 2 Archipelago implementation.

- Send locations by catching monkeys
- Receive gadgets and level unlocks
- Randomise the order of levels
- Choose to play as Hikaru or Kakeru (Jimmy or Spike)
- Customise your experience with different logic difficulties and trick toggles
- Optionally lock the "Air Crawl" glitch behind an item
- Full YAML-less Universal Tracker support for all options
- Complete your seed by beating "Showdown with Specter!" or "Final Showdown with Specter!"

For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/ae2_archipelago/blob/main/docs/setup.md)
v1.0.0.title: Ape Escape 2 Archipelago v1.0.0

v1.0.1.description:
- Fixed an issue where the Stun Club would automatically be equipped, even if it wasn't unlocked.
- Fixed an issue where gadgets would sometimes not be automatically equipped.
- Improved the client connection process.
- Added additional indicators to the client to help with diagnosing connection issues.
- Prevented received death links from triggering if the player is not currently in a level.
- Added Linux support (untested).
- Logic adjustments.

For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/ae2_archipelago/blob/main/docs/setup.md)
v1.0.1.title: Ape Escape 2 Archipelago v1.0.1

v1.1.0.description:
- Added optional locations behind message phones.
- You can now choose to start without the Monkey Net - or any gadgets at all! Starting without the Monkey Net requires that message phone locations be enabled.
- Added location groups for each level.
- Fixed Linux support.
- Logic adjustments.

For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/ae2_archipelago/blob/main/docs/setup.md)
v1.1.0.title: Ape Escape 2 Archipelago v1.1.0
